# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### Statistical Inference for Rank Allocation in Low-Rank Adaptation
- Source: HF Daily Papers
- Category: open-source
- URL: https://tldr.takara.ai/p/2607.20205
- Summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely used parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models. ### N-day is Becoming N-Hour. Patching Faster Won't Save You.
- Source: The Hacker News
- Category: security
- URL: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/n-day-is-becoming-n-hour-patching.html
- Summary: Every patch is a confession. The moment a vendor ships a security fix, the diff between the old code and the new code tells anyone watching exactly what was broken and where. Turn that diff back into a working exploit, and you can hit every system that hasn't updated yet. This is N-day...
